# MPMoviePlayerThumbnailErrorKey | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Media Player ](/documentation/mediaplayer)

- [ MPMoviePlayerThumbnailErrorKey ](/documentation/mediaplayer/mpmovieplayerthumbnailerrorkey)

-  MPMoviePlayerThumbnailErrorKey 

Global Variable# MPMoviePlayerThumbnailErrorKey

iOS 3.2–9.0DeprecatediPadOS 3.2–9.0DeprecatedMac Catalyst 13.1–13.1DeprecatedtvOSDeprecated

```
let MPMoviePlayerThumbnailErrorKey: String
```

Deprecated

Use AVPlayerViewController in AVKit

## [Discussion](/documentation/mediaplayer/mpmovieplayerthumbnailerrorkey#Discussion)

The value of this key is an [`NSError`](/documentation/Foundation/NSError) object identifying the error that occurred, if any.
